title: TCIH-Chat: A Context-Aware Event-Hypergraph Framework and Conversational Assistant for Automated Construction and Structural Diagnosis of Mathematical Proofs
description: Reference implementation and reproducibility artefact for the paper of the same name (submitted to Expert Systems with Applications). Includes the corrected typed contextual inference hypergraph (TCIH) model, the TCIH-Chat assistant (a terminating intuitionistic prover and natural-deduction synthesizer, a linear-time structural checker, a four-tier SMT/CAS/Lean semantic oracle, and proof-error diagnosis with localization), a regression suite with one machine-checked test per corrected theorem, deterministic artefact generators, the manuscript with figures, and a structure-only sample of the proof-graph corpus (the full structure-only corpus is attached as a release asset).
